Vocabulary - राज्ञी मालादेवी | Story 1

27 Mar 2021 | Sanskrit Sanskrit-Stories Sanskrit-Vocabulary

Image from Telegram Channel - kathaaH कथाः

Meanings from - Learnsanskrit.cc

Sanskrit Word English Meaning
अतः therefore / hence / so
अल्पेन for little [instr.] / easily
एव really
अनन्तर afterwards / direct /
तदा at that time / then
शास्ति order / rule / punish / proclaim
राज्ञी queen
आनीय bringing / having brought
पुरतः in front / in the presence of
तस्याः her
तस्य his
अस्मदीय our / ours
अत्यल्प very little
तथापि even then / yet / even so
तु but / and
मम my
उत्थाय standing up / having risen / stood up
भवती you [respectful]
अपि too / even / also
मया by me
उक्त्वा having spoken / having said
अद्य today

Few Sankrit Sentences

Sanskrit Sentence English Meaning
तान् एव those very persons
अत एव for this very reason
एवम् एव just
सत्यम् एव indeed
किञ्चित् एव A little
पूर्वम् एव already
अद्य एव वा? Is it today?
इदानीम् एव वा? Is it going to be now?
भवान् एव किम् ? Is that you?
एवमेव आगतवान् I just dropped in. / Just came to call on you.
न, त्वदीयम् एव No, it is yours.
लवणं एव नास्ति No salt at all.
स्थलम् एव नास्ति there is no place
उक्तम् एव वदति सः He has been repeating the same thing. / He repeats himself.
वयं आगतवन्तः एव We have already arrived.
दृष्टुं एव न शक्यते Can’t see it.
   
कस्यचित् कालस्य अनन्तरम् after some time
भवती अनन्तरं उपविशतु You sit down a little later.
अस्मिन् विषये अनन्तरं वदामि I’ll tell you about it later.
इदानीं मास्तु, अनन्तरं ददामि Not now, I will give it to you later.
इदानीं मास्तु, अनन्तरं आगच्छामि Not now, I will come later.
   
एतस्य मूल्यं किम् ? What is the price of this?
एतस्य किं कारणम् ? What is the reason for this?
   
तदा सः षड्वयस्कः He was six at the time.
पाकः तदानीं एव सिद्धः Food is ready a while ago itself.
दैवेच्छा तदा आसीत्, किं कुर्मः? It was God’s will. What shall we do?
तदा तदा उदरवेदना पीडयति किल? You get stomach-ache now and then, don’t you?
   
ज्ञातं वा? Understood?
तद् अहं न ज्ञातवान् I did not know this.
भवान् एव वा! दूरतः न ज्ञातम् Is it you? I couldn’t recognise you from a distance.
   
तस्य हृदये in his heart
तस्य मूल्यम् the price of that
तस्य कः अर्थः? What does it mean?
   
किन्तु अस्याः भयम् अस्ति but she is afraid
   
मम गृहे in my house
मम वाक्यात् in my words
मम ग्रामः my village
एषा मम सखी This is my friend (fem.).
त्वम् मम मित्रम् You are my friend.
तत् मम नगरम् This is my town.
   
भीतिः मास्तु Don’t get frightened.
लज्जा मास्तु. Do not feel shy.
सर्वथा मास्तु Definitely no.
मूढत्वं मास्तु Don’t be so stupid!
   
अपि कुशलम्? Are you all right?
मुहूर्तम् अपि only a moment
अपि सत्यम् ? Is it true?
अपि सह परिणीतः ? Is he married ?
अपि सर्वं कुशलम् ? Is everything ok?
अपि तत् उष्णम् अस्ति ? Is that hot?
   
मया दृष्ट seen by me
स मया सह वसति he lives with me [at my place]
मया अन्यत्र गन्तव्यम् I must go elsewhere.
मया किं करणीयं, वदतु Tell me what I should do.
   
निश्चयेन न इति सा उक्त्वा मन्दं हसितवती She said “Of course not” and smiled at me.
   
गत्वा शयनं करोतु Go and sleep
तत्र गत्वा किं करोति? What are you going to do there?
इदानीं गत्वा किञ्चित् पठतु Go and read now.

Note - All meanings are from the above mentioned website. If there is any mistake, do inform.
